title: bupleurum ranunculoides var. multinerve
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides var. multinerve, a type of flowering plant, is a variant of the Bupleurum ranunculoides species, commonly known as Chinese thorowax or Hare's ear. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and anti-viral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides var. multinerve include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
